case_title: HARVEY SALAZAR VS. SOUTHWEST LEGAL GROUP

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-03-2013 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED - SERVED APR-01-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SOUTHWEST LEGAL GROUP

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SALAZAR, HARVEY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SOUTHWEST LEGAL GROUP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SOUTHWEST LEGAL GROUP
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL *AGENT FOR SERVICE: MARIE BALLON* FILED BY PLAINTIFF SALAZAR, HARVEY AS TO DEFENDANT SOUTHWEST LEGAL GROUP

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-03-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-03-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MARIS C. BALLON - EMPLOYEE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
